<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\Code; use PHPUnit\Event\NoPreviousThrowableException; use PHPUnit\Framework\Exception; use PHPUnit\Util\Filter; use PHPUnit\Util\ThrowableToStringMapper; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class ThrowableBuilder { /** * @throws Exception * @throws NoPreviousThrowableException */ public static function from(\Throwable $t): Throwable { $previous = $t->getPrevious(); if ($previous !== null) { $previous = self::from($previous); } return new Throwable( $t::class, $t->getMessage(), ThrowableToStringMapper::map($t), Filter::stackTraceFromThrowableAsString($t, false), $previous, ); } }
